# AudioHardwareTap

**Class**

Instances of the AudioHardwareTap class encapsulate a single audio tap, which can capture outgoing audio from a process or group of processes, and be used as an input stream source in an aggregate device.

## Declaration

```swift
class AudioHardwareTap
```

## Initializers

- **init(id:)**

## Instance Properties

- **description**: The CATapDescription that describes the configuration of this tap.
- **format**: An AudioStreamBasicDescription that describes the current data format for the tap. This is the format of the data that will be accessible in any aggregate device that contains the tap.
- **uid**: A String that contains a persistent identifier for the tap. A tap’s UID persists until the tap is destroyed.

## Instance Methods

- **setDescription(_:)**: Set the description property.

## Inherits From

- AudioHardwareObject

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
